Text.Page:
So, you're well on your path to becoming a hero worthy of legend...but it still seems like there's something missing.

I've got it! Gloves! And I've got just the pair to perfectly complement your new weapon.

Make your mark by winning five times in Kumasylum, and they're yours! Good luck!

I knew you had it in you, !

Here you go: the gloves I promised. Well done!
